purpose: Day-7 EXPANDED external drug-target FROZEN label set for the 98-gene eligible universe. Label-gathering half of the powered external validation. Scoring (AUROC vs baselines) is done SEPARATELY in the main kernel; NO AUROC computed here.
external_truth_source: Open Targets Platform — Disease.drugAndClinicalCandidates (indication drug pool, incl. ontology descendants) intersected with Target.drugAndClinicalCandidates mechanism edges, over 15 pre-registered autoimmune indications. Fetched 2026-07-11.
honesty_headline: Literal iter4 tier2 rule => 56/98 positive, but 38 are positive ONLY via a single metformin->complex-I(NDUF) MoA annotation (not independent evidence). Immune-mechanism sensitivity tier => 7 positive (CD3E,CD6,CD52,FKBP1A,IL2RB,PPIA,TNF). Both reported; nothing tuned or dropped.
